title: lora_l2.c:672 start uses lora_transition not lora_transition_from
description: Contract violation: lichen_lora_l2_start() - Uses lora_transition(LORA_RUNNING) at line 672, not lora_transition_from(LORA_STOPPED, LORA_RUNNING). Between double-check at 623 and transition at 672, state could change if another thread bypasses mutex (impossible with current code, but violates defensive programming). Also, lora_transition() forces ABORTED on invalid transition - if state changed, both transitions would fail, creating orphan state. WHY: Using _from variant is more robust. HOW to fix: Replace lora_transition(LORA_RUNNING) with lora_transition_from(LORA_STOPPED, LORA_RUNNING), handling -EAGAIN appropriately.
close_reason: Duplicate of project-LICHEN-d7ub.18 - same root cause (non-CAS state transitions)
